name: openclaw-agents-481-07
description: Standardized Safe Setup for AI Discussions - CPSC 481.07

scripts.setup: npm install && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('.env')) fs.copyFileSync('.env.example', '.env');"
scripts.restart:win: powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run start:win"
scripts.restart:mac: pkill -f openclaw || true && npm run start:mac
